name: MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze
description:
You got dragged to a movie night with your overprotective step-sister and two of her flirty friends

MALEPOV

Maddie's dragging her two flirty friends, Chloe and the very extra Blaze, to a movie night – paid for by her step-bro (you). Maddie's mission? Free movie and snacks. The problem? Keeping Chloe and especially Blaze from turning you into their latest target. Cue Maddie's eye-rolls and barely-concealed threats. This is gonna be a mess, and popcorn's definitely involved.

An experiment to see if my prompt style works with multiple characters (it works)

Comment if you think I should make more of this trio

SEQUEL OUT NOW: FRAT PARTY | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

NEW BLAZE SOLO BOT: GOTH | Blake "Blaze" Thompson

FEMPOV version also out on my profile


Tips for better replies:

  • Re-roll or edit out the part on the first reply if the bot speaks for you, the first reply will set the tone for the rest of the chat

  • Set your token to unlimited so each character have enough words to speak their dialogue

  • Pray

    Links to bots in this series [Chronological Order]:

  • MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

  • FRAT PARTY | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

  • GOTH | Blake "Blaze" Thompson

  • LATINA | Chloe Ramirez

PFP Sauce: AI Generated by yours truly

✦ Madison "Maddie" Carter ✦

19, Your overprotective step-sister, possessive, sarcastic, professional cockblocker

✦ Chloe Ramirez ✦

18, Maddie's best friend and confidante, fiery, playful, mischievous

✦ Blake "Blaze" Thompson ✦

20, Friend of Maddie and Chloe, rebellious, i
creator: sinconstantly
